<!--
Thanks for the pull request. A few quick notes:

- Match the scope: typo fixes, broken-link repair, and factual corrections
  are always welcome. Larger changes — new skills, research documents,
  experiments, or blog posts — benefit from a short Issue or Discussion
  first so we can align on direction.
- Skills and conventions evolve through the `skill-lifecycle` process.
  New requirement IDs ([PREFIX-NNN]) and cross-skill references should be
  discussed before landing.
- Blog drafts land in `Blog/Draft/` with YAML frontmatter per the
  `blog-process` skill.
-->
